name: Co Engine
description: An advanced procedural generation suite, multi-track timeline architect, and keyframe engine for Geometry Dash 2.2.

floating-icon-size.name: Floating Menu Scale
floating-icon-size.description: Adjust the scale of the floating circle ✐ button in the editor UI.

auto-ldm-default.name: Default Optimizer Depth
auto-ldm-default.description: Sets the default pass filtering logic when using the quick optimizer tool.

enable-procedural-logs.name: Enable Debug Logs
enable-procedural-logs.description: Writes generation data to the console for troubleshooting.

timeline-track-color.name: Timeline Highlight Color
timeline-track-color.description: Changes the accent color of your custom timeline tracks.
